edgeCases: Missing evidence source omits its PR-body section (never fabricated)
Gate status line never faked when no gatekeeper verdict or verification tally is sourceable
Changelog insertion is idempotent: re-running deliver leaves exactly one bullet
Missing CHANGELOG.md is a graceful no-op, not an error
gh absent: branch still pushed, manual instructions, non-zero exit, never claims a PR opened
No origin remote refuses PR delivery before any push
Released sections (below --- or under a released heading) are never modified
FILL-slot changelog stub ignored; seed derived from brief or feature slug
No [Unreleased] block: InsertEntry returns unchanged text + false
